business.name: Amcot Fashion
business.full_address: GROUND FLOOR, 64, New Cloth Market, Sarangpur, Sherkotda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380002, India

hero.title: Discover Unrivaled Elegance
hero.subtitle: Amcot Fashion crafts exceptional textiles, defining luxury for the modern wardrobe.

about.title: The Art of Refined Textiles
about.description: Amcot Fashion blends heritage craftsmanship with contemporary innovation, creating fabrics that embody sophistication and timeless style. Our commitment to quality ensures every thread tells a story of luxury.

gallery.title: Curated Visions in Fabric
gallery.description: Immerse yourself in the visual artistry of our textiles. Each piece showcases meticulous detail, luxurious texture, and the superior drape that defines Amcot Fashion.

cta.title: Elevate Your Next Collection
cta.description: Partner with Amcot Fashion to transform your design concepts into reality with fabrics of unparalleled quality and distinction.

contact.title: Connect With Amcot Fashion
contact.description: We invite your inquiries for bespoke textile consultations or partnership opportunities. Our dedicated team is ready to assist you.
